title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spar India

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Spar India
jsonLd.description:
We at Spar India are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Spar India:
Spar India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spar India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
